use_cases: Labeling required form fields in accessible web applications
Providing accessible form labels with peer-disabled state styling
Integrating with shadcn/ui form components for consistent styling
ai_summary: A minimalist form label component built on Radix UI primitives with class-variance-authority styling. Part of the shadcn ecosystem, it provides accessible labeling for form inputs with peer-disabled cursor and opacity state support. Used to mark required textarea fields in forms.
